reviews.author: Mouadh Gta
reviews.text: I really appreciate your kindness, support, and great service. It was a very good experience, and I truly enjoyed my stay. It’s a new and very clean building. Highly recommended

reviews.author: Paule Megell
reviews.text: I felt very safe and well looked after during my stay. I want to give a shout-out to the night guards, Yassine and Jacopo💪🏻, for their professionalism and for being so helpful during the late hours. Also, a big thanks to Yuliia for her excellent coordination. A wonderful team! 🫰🏻

reviews.author: Hind Taliani
reviews.text: 🥰The staff at the reception are the heart of this place. A special thanks to Olivia and Jacopo for being so welcoming, helpful, and always smiling. They made my check-in and daily interactions so smooth and pleasant. Thank you for the great hospitality!
